headline_original: GNU suspends airport visa-on-arrival system temporarily
article_snippet: Libya’s Government of National Unity (GNU) has temporarily suspended the issuance of visas on arrival at airports and air entry points as part of efforts to regulate the entry of foreign nationals and strengthen border controls. The decision was outlined in a letter from Minister of State for Prime Ministerial Affairs Mohammed Ben Ghalbon to Interior Minister Emad Al-Trabelsi.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant

headline_original: Maltese authorities seize cocaine shipment bound for Libya
article_snippet: Maltese customs authorities have seized a 113-kilogram cocaine shipment concealed inside a container at the Malta Freeport that was awaiting transshipment to Libya. The authorities said the drugs were discovered during a customs inspection of a container arriving from Costa Rica. The cocaine was hidden among declared cargo, prompting the launch of an investigation.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant
